channel.title: Exim on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Exim on Pi Stack

item.title: Postfix vs Exim: Best Self-Hosted Mail Transfer Agent (MTA) 2026
item.description: Choosing the right Mail Transfer Agent (MTA) is one of the most critical decisions when building a self-hosted email server. The MTA handles all incoming and outgoing mail — routing, queuing, delivery, and relay — making it the backbone of your email infrastructure.
